description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build & publish PyPI packages that triggers on push of tags matching v[0-9]+.** and on workflow dispatch. The workflow should have four jobs: build-sdist, build, upload_to_test_pypy, and upload_to_pypi. The build job should run on multiple platforms with Python 3.10, building wheels and uploading artifacts. The upload jobs should download artifacts and publish to test PyPI and PyPI respectively.
